mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_DEV_REQUEST WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DEV_REQUEST (REQ_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENT, URGENCY, REG_ID) VALUES (#{reqType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{urgency}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_DEV_REQUEST SET STATUS = #{status}, DUE_DT = #{dueDt}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq}
UPDATE TB_DEV_REQUEST SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_DT = NOW() WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM TB_DEV_COMMENT WHERE REQ_SEQ = #{reqSeq} AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY REG_DT ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_DEV_COMMENT (REQ_SEQ, CONTENT, REG_ID) VALUES (#{reqSeq}, #{content}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_DEV_COMMENT SET DEL_YN = 'Y' WHERE CMT_SEQ = #{cmtSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(REQ_SEQ) AS totalCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS waitCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'PROCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS processCnt, SUM(CASE WHEN STATUS = 'DONE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS doneCnt FROM TB_DEV_REQUEST WHERE DEL_YN = 'N'
